content_fingerprint: amazon and hugging face co author a practical guide to running foundation models on aws a new community guide walks engineers through the core aws building blocks for training and serving foundation models offering a consolidated reference for deploying at scale on the cloud platform hugging face published a community guide co authored by amazon that lays out the foundational aws infrastructure components for training and serving foundation models the article titled building blocks for foundation model training and inference on aws was authored by keita watanabe and went live on the hugging fa
